# vastai_ssh_keys (Data Source)

Lists all SSH keys for the authenticated Vast.ai user. Returns the key ID, public key content, and creation timestamp for each key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all SSH keys for the authenticated user
data "vastai_ssh_keys" "all" {}

output "key_count" {
  value = length(data.vastai_ssh_keys.all.ssh_keys)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ssh_keys` (Attributes List) List of SSH keys associated with the authenticated user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ssh_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--ssh_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ssh_keys`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the SSH key was created.
- `id` (String) Unique numeric identifier of the SSH key.
- `ssh_key` (String, Sensitive) SSH public key content.
